sources.claim: AI in Manufacturing market = $34.18B in 2025, projected $155.04B by 2030 at CAGR 35.3%
sources.notes: Industry-standard market research firm; figures confirmed across multiple secondary sources

sources.claim: AI in Manufacturing market size and growth forecast through 2034
sources.notes: Corroborates MarketsandMarkets CAGR range; provides segment breakdowns

sources.claim: 22% of manufacturers plan to deploy physical AI by 2028; 3.8M new manufacturing workers needed by 2033
sources.notes: Annual manufacturing outlook report; widely cited by industry press

sources.claim: Augury raised $75M at $1B+ unicorn valuation in Feb 2025; customers include PepsiCo, Nestlé, DuPont
sources.notes: Primary news coverage of funding round; $75M figure confirmed by company press release

sources.claim: ILO adopted first-ever global conclusions on AI and work in manufacturing (2025)
sources.notes: Official UN agency press release; landmark regulatory milestone for industrial AI

sources.claim: 2026 declared the year agentic AI transforms industrial manufacturing; AI agents now orchestrate production
sources.notes: Leading trade publication for manufacturing; sponsored content from industrial AI vendor but factual claims verified

sources.claim: 500,000 unfilled US manufacturing jobs due to skills gap; tariff reshoring pressure driving automation investment
sources.notes: Aggregates BLS and Deloitte/Manufacturing Institute data; US Labor Dept figures corroborate the 500K unfilled jobs figure

sources.claim: 5 key manufacturing trends for 2026: tariffs, AI, workforce, reshoring, capital investment
sources.notes: Editorial (not sponsored); primary journalism summarizing the macro forces shaping industrial AI adoption

sources.claim: AI in Industrial Automation Market: $23.76B in 2025, $131.62B by 2035 at 18.8% CAGR; Siemens, ABB, Rockwell lead
sources.notes: Narrower 'industrial automation' scope vs broader 'AI in manufacturing' — both confirm double-digit CAGR trajectory

sources.claim: AI can save manufacturing $1.2 trillion annually through predictive maintenance and analytics; FANUC and Yaskawa platform milestones
sources.notes: Detailed 2026-edition implementation analysis; $1.2T savings figure originates from McKinsey Global Institute (2018) and widely reproduced

sources.claim: Manufacturers reporting 30–50% reduction in unplanned downtime with AI predictive maintenance
sources.notes: Aggregates vendor and academic case study data; consistent with peer-reviewed figures from NCBI industrial AI studies

sources.claim: AI in manufacturing: Progress in implementing EU Coordinated Plan on AI — regulatory framework for industrial AI
sources.notes: Official OECD policy report; primary source for EU AI Act impact on manufacturing compliance requirements

unverified_claims.claim: Search volume ~74,000/mo for 'AI in manufacturing' and related terms
unverified_claims.reason: Aggregate estimate based on related keyword clusters; no direct Keywords Everywhere data run

unverified_claims.claim: 3M growth estimate of +9% QoQ based on accelerating CAGR trajectory
unverified_claims.reason: Extrapolated from annual CAGR 35.3% / 4 quarters = ~8% per quarter; no Q1 2026 quarter-specific market data available at research date
